data.patch.py:
filepath = "/app/src/api/v1/dependencies/auth.py"
with open(filepath, "r") as f:
    content = f.read()

if "verify_aud" in content and "RS256" in content:
    print("Already patched")
    exit(0)

old = """        payload = jwt.decode(
            token,
            settings.jwt_secret.get_secret_value(),
            algorithms=[settings.jwt_algorithm],
            audience=\"flowmaster-api\"
        )"""

new = """        # Support RS256 (auth-service) and HS256 (legacy)
        decode_key = settings.jwt_secret.get_secret_value()
        if settings.jwt_algorithm == 'RS256':
            payload = jwt.decode(token, decode_key, algorithms=[settings.jwt_algorithm], options={'verify_aud': False})
        else:
            payload = jwt.decode(token, decode_key, algorithms=[settings.jwt_algorithm], audience=\"flowmaster-api\")"""

if old in content:
    content = content.replace(old, new)
    with open(filepath, "w") as f:
        f.write(content)
    print("Patched OK")
else:
    print("Pattern not found - showing relevant lines:")
    for i, l in enumerate(content.split(chr(10))):
        if "jwt.decode" in l or "audience" in l:
            print(f"{i}: {l}")
